/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DesktopPet.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DesktopPet.dir/DesktopPet_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DesktopPet.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DesktopPet.dir/DesktopPet_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_assets.cpp.o -o DesktopPet  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
